content.text:
# Plan: persistent lookup cache

## Slice 1: Cache value type with staleness predicate
Step 1. Create src/cache.ts exporting read(key): Entry|null and write(key, value): void backed by a JSON file at ~/.tool-cache.json.
Step 2. Add pure isFresh(timestamp, nowMs, windowMs): boolean.
Tests: round-trip read returns the written value; isFresh false past the window boundary.

## Slice 2: Wire fetchRemote to consult the cache
Step 1. Edit src/lookup.ts:42 so fetchRemote(key) returns cache.read(key) when isFresh, else fetches and calls cache.write.
Tests: second invocation within the window performs no network call (spy on the fetch).

## Slice 3: Atomic write-and-rename
Step 1. In src/cache.ts write to a temp file then rename into place.
Tests: two concurrent writers never leave a partial file.
